title: Event
description: Event schema from Google Analytics API

name.description: The name of the event. Must not use reserved names (ad_click, app_exception, error, session_start, etc.) or reserved prefixes (_, firebase_, ga_, google_, gtag.).

params.description: Event parameters as key-value pairs. Common parameters include session_id, engagement_time_msec, and timestamp_micros.

session_id.description: Session identifier for accurate session metrics.

timestamp_micros.description: Unix epoch time in microseconds to override event timestamp.
